• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Extract top weights MOFA

Analysis: 1. Extract top weights for factors 2 (drugs) 2. Extract top weights for factors 4 (mutations) 3. Extract top weights for factors 4 (drugs)

clean environment

rm(list=ls())

set directory (replace by your path)

    knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(\/home/flomik/Code/MOFA_AML/\)) 
library(MOFA2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(GSEABase)
library(tidyverse)
library(xlsx)
library(maditr)
library(\AnnotationDbi\)

Analysis

load data (replace by directory)

load(\/home/flomik/Data/MOFA_R_Objects/AML_MAexp_v05.RData\)
ls()
[1] \MAexp\ \pData\
MAexp

pData

load MOFA object (replace by your repository)

load(\/home/flomik/Data/MOFA_R_Objects/MOFA_v04_train_list.RData\)

load annotations

annot.df <- read.table(\/home/flomik/Code/MOFA_AML/data/MOFA/MOFA_v04_annot_features.txt\, sep=\\t\, header = T, stringsAsFactors = F)
conv <- read.xlsx(\/home/flomik/Code/MOFA_AML/data/Drugs/Annotation_curated_DrugBank_ChEMBL_class_revised_2021-10-28.xlsx\, 1)
conv <- conv[,c(1,2, 5)]
colnames(conv)[1] <- \feature\

Select MOFA object

mofa.sel <- select_model(mofa.list)
list_drugs <- c(\Venetoclax\, \Azacitidine\, \Fludarabine\, \Decitabine\, \Crenolanib\, \Midostaurin\, \Sorafenib\, \Quizartinib\, \Gilteribinib\)
list_factors <- c(\DDHM2\, \DDHM5\, \DDHM8\, \DDHM9\, \DDHM4\, \DDHM11\)
weights <- get_weights(mofa.sel, views = \DSRT\, factor = 2, scale = TRUE, as.data.frame = TRUE)
weights <- merge(conv, weights, by = \feature\)
weights <- weights[order(weights$value, decreasing = FALSE),]
weights <- weights[1:30,]
weights$feature.name <- factor(weights$feature.name, levels = rev(weights$feature.name))
data <- weights
colnames(data)[c(2, 5)] <- c(\x\, \y\)
# Plot
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=x, y=y)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x=x, xend=x, y=0, yend=y), 
    color=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Azacitidine\,\Venetoclax\), \#1F78B4\, \grey\), 
    size=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Azacitidine\,\Venetoclax\), 1.3, 0.7)
  ) +
  geom_point(
    color=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Azacitidine\,\Venetoclax\), \#1F78B4\, \grey\), 
    size=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Azacitidine\,\Venetoclax\), 5, 2)
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme(
    legend.position=\none\
  ) +
  xlab(\\) +
  ylab(\weight\) +
  ggtitle(\DDHM2\)+ theme_light()+theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(size = 0.5, linetype = \solid\,
                                   colour = \grey\))  # Black and white theme
p

ggsave(\results/figures/top_negative_weights_drugs_factor_2.pdf\, width = 4)
weights <- get_weights(mofa.sel, views = \Mutations\, factor = 4, scale = TRUE, as.data.frame = TRUE)
weights <- weights[order(abs(weights$value), decreasing = TRUE),]
colnames(weights)[1] <- \feature.name\
weights$feature.name <- factor(weights$feature.name, levels = rev(weights$feature.name))
data <- weights
colnames(data)[c(1, 3)] <- c(\x\, \y\)
# Plot
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=x, y=y)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x=x, xend=x, y=0, yend=y), 
    color=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\FLT3_ITD\, \FLT3_HS\), \#B2DF8A\, \grey\), 
    size=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\FLT3_ITD\, \FLT3_HS\), 1.3, 0.7)
  ) +
  geom_point(
    color=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\FLT3_ITD\, \FLT3_HS\), \#B2DF8A\, \grey\), 
    size=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\FLT3_ITD\, \FLT3_HS\), 5, 2)
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme(
    legend.position=\none\
  ) +
  xlab(\\) +
  ylab(\weight\) +
  ggtitle(\DDHM4\)+ theme_light()+theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(size = 0.5, linetype = \solid\,
                                   colour = \grey\))  # Black and white theme
p

ggsave(\results/figures/top_weights_mutations_factor_4.pdf\, width = 4)
weights <- get_weights(mofa.sel, views = \DSRT\, factor = 4, scale = TRUE, as.data.frame = TRUE)
weights <- merge(conv, weights, by = \feature\)
weights <- weights[order(abs(weights$value), decreasing = TRUE),]
weights <- weights[1:30,]
weights$feature.name <- factor(weights$feature.name, levels = rev(weights$feature.name))
data <- weights
colnames(data)[c(2, 5)] <- c(\x\, \y\)
# Plot
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=x, y=y)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x=x, xend=x, y=0, yend=y), 
    color=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Sorafenib\), \#B2DF8A\, \grey\), 
    size=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Sorafenib\), 1.3, 0.7)
  ) +
  geom_point(
    color=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Sorafenib\), \#B2DF8A\, \grey\), 
    size=ifelse(data$x %in% c(\Sorafenib\), 5, 2)
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme(
    legend.position=\none\
  ) +
  xlab(\\) +
  ylab(\weight\) +
  ggtitle(\DDHM4\)+ theme_light()+theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(size = 0.5, linetype = \solid\,
                                   colour = \grey\))  # Black and white theme
p

ggsave(\results/figures/top_weights_drugs_factor_4.pdf\, width = 4)
weights <- weights[weights$feature.name %in% list_drugs,]
weights$factor <- as.vector(weights$factor)
weights$factor <- gsub(\Factor\, \DDHM\, weights$factor)
weights$value[abs(weights$value) < 0.1] <- NA
weights <- weights[weights$factor %in% list_factors,]
# Color Brewer palette
ggplot(weights, aes(feature.name, factor, fill= value)) + 
  geom_tile()+scale_fill_gradient2(midpoint = 0, low = \blue\, mid = \white\, high = \red\)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

ggsave(\results/figures/weights_drugs_each_factor.png\)
